## Checklist

### Spec compliance
- [ ] Chay `./validate-skills.sh` — khong co error

- [ ] Name trong frontmatter khop ten folder

### Noi dung
- [ ] Co "Buoc 0: Kiem tra context" de doc `product-marketing-context`

- [ ] Co output template co cau truc
- [ ] Co cross-references den skill lien quan
- [ ] Co quality checklist
- [ ] Duoi 500 dong

### Vietnam-first

- [ ] Van hoa VN (khong copy paste nguoi nuoc ngoai)
- [ ] Kenh phu hop VN (Zalo, TikTok, Meta, Shopee)

### Housekeeping
